positive: A vibrant, stylized geometric floral pattern featuring overlapping stylized lilies, abstract vines, and repeating celestial motifs like crescent moons and stars. The composition should be highly symmetrical and centered, suitable for tiling on fabric. Use a limited but rich color palette of deep sapphire blue, burnt orange, emerald green, and cream. The style should be graphic art, mixed with Art Deco influence and modern vector illustration quality. Crisp lines, clean silhouettes, high contrast between the patterned elements and the background, perfect for commercial textile printing.
negative: blurry, messy, grainy, watermark, logo, text, signature, copyright, low detail, noisy, artifact, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy
